name: Eagles Key Lime Pie
recipeIngredient: 14 Ounce Sweetened Condensed Milk - Eagle Brand
1 Pie Shell, Frozen or 6-Ounce Graham Cracker Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat egg yolks with condensed milk, lime juice, and green food coloring if desired.
3. Pour mixture into prepared pie crust.
4. Bake for 30 minutes.
